questions.prompt_html:
Find the great circle distance (to the nearest kilometer) between Los Angeles, USA (L), and Sydney, Australia (S), with geographic coordinates (latL 33.95∘, longL -118.41∘) and (latS -33.94∘, longS 151.18∘), respectively. 
The mean radius of the Earth is approximately 6368 km.

questions.prompt_html:
An aircraft flies on a great circle path from Rome, Italy (R), (latR 41.88∘, longA12.51∘), to Montreal, Canada (M), (latM 45.47∘, longM -73.74∘). 
Find the shortest distance from its path to the North Pole to the nearest kilometer. 
The mean radius of the Earth is approximately 6368 km.

questions.prompt_html:
An aircraft flies from Copenhagen, Denmark (C), (latR 55.68∘, longA12.57∘) to San Francisco, USA (S), 
(latM 37.78∘, longM -122.43∘).
(i) In what direction should the aircraft head to fly to San Francisco?
(ii) In what direction will it be flying when it arrives over San Francisco?
questions.prompt_text: An aircraft flies from Copenhagen, Denmark (C), (lat R 55.68 ∘ , long A 12.57 ∘ ) to San Francisco, USA (S), (lat M 37.78 ∘ , long M -122.43 ∘ ). (i) In what direction should the aircraft head to fly to San Francisco? (ii) In what direction will it be flying when it arrives over San Francisco?

choices.label: A
choices.html: (i) 34.70° north of west, (ii) 23.96° north of east

choices.label: B
choices.html: (i) 34.70° west of north, (ii) 23.96° east of north
choices.text: (i) 34.70° west of north, (ii) 23.96° east of north

choices.label: C
choices.html: (i) 23.96° west of north, (ii) 34.70° east of north
choices.text: (i) 23.96° west of north, (ii) 34.70° east of north

choices.label: D
choices.html: (i) 23.96° east of north, (ii) 34.70° west of north
